name: openinherit
description: INHERIT — open estate data interchange standard

scripts.test: jsonschema test tests/ --resolve v1/dialect.json --resolve v1/asset-collection.json --resolve v1/asset-interest.json --resolve v1/asset.json --resolve v1/attestation.json --resolve v1/bequest.json --resolve v1/catalogue.json --resolve v1/dealer-interest.json --resolve v1/document.json --resolve v1/estate.json --resolve v1/executor.json --resolve v1/guardian.json --resolve v1/kinship.json --resolve v1/liability.json --resolve v1/lifetime-transfer.json --resolve v1/nonprobate-transfer.json --resolve v1/person.json --resolve v1/property.json --resolve v1/proxy-authorisation.json --resolve v1/relationship.json --resolve v1/schema.json --resolve v1/trust.json --resolve v1/valuation.json --resolve v1/wish.json --resolve v1/common/address.json --resolve v1/common/completeness.json --resolve v1/common/identifier.json --resolve v1/common/jurisdiction.json --resolve v1/common/media.json --resolve v1/common/money.json --resolve v1/common/tax-position.json --resolve v1/common/temporal-rule.json --resolve v1/common/visibility.json --extension .test.json
scripts.lint:schema: jsonschema lint v1/*.json v1/common/*.json --resolve v1/dialect.json --resolve v1/common/ --resolve v1/ --exclude top_level_examples --exclude simple_properties_identifiers
scripts.metaschema: jsonschema metaschema v1/*.json v1/common/*.json --resolve v1/dialect.json --resolve v1/common/
